title: citrus dulcamara
intro: Citrus dulcamara, also known as bitter orange or sour orange, is a type of citrus plant native to Asia and Southeastern Europe. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of citrus dulcamara include its potential to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and diarrhea, as well as its possible role in reducing cholesterol levels and improving cardiovascular health. Citrus dulcamara can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurvedic practices.
